src: 📱⚡️ Lighthouse for Mobile - audits your app and gives a performance score to your Android apps (native, React Native, Flutter..). Measure performance on CLI, E2E tests, CI...
ja: 📱⚡️ Lighthouse for Mobile — Android アプリ（ネイティブ・React Native・Flutter など）を監査してパフォーマンススコアを算出。CLI・E2E テスト・CI でパフォーマンスを計測
